name: bigdata-skill
description: >- Pull Bigdata.com (RavenPack) financial and news data via the official `bigdata-client` SDK and `/v1/*` REST endpoints — structured financials, prices, analyst estimates, daily entity-sentiment series, annotated chunk search, screener — when the Bigdata MCP returns only pre-synthesized tearsheets but you need the machine-readable substrate. Use when the user mentions Bigdata.com, RavenPack, a `bd_v2_` key, the bigdata MCP, rp_entity_id, chunk/query_unit cost, or wants structured financials, fu
author: daymade
